/usr/bin/c++   -std=c++0x -std=c++11 -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/test_polynomial.dir/test/test_polynomial.cpp.o  -o ../../devel/lib/mav_trajectory_generation/test_polynomial  -L/home/woods/uuv/motion_planner_ws/src/cmake-build-debug/gtest -Wl,-rpath,/home/woods/uuv/motion_planner_ws/src/cmake-build-debug/gtest:/home/woods/uuv/motion_planner_ws/src/cmake-build-debug/gtest/googlemock/gtest:/home/woods/uuv/motion_planner_ws/src/cmake-build-debug/devel/lib:/home/woods/uuv/test_ws/devel/lib:/opt/ros/melodic/lib ../../gtest/googlemock/gtest/libgtest.so ../../devel/lib/libmav_trajectory_generation.so /home/woods/uuv/test_ws/devel/lib/libeigen_checks.so -lglog /home/woods/uuv/test_ws/devel/lib/libgflags.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libroscpp_serialization.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/librostime.so /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libcpp_common.so -lboost_system -lboost_thread -lboost_chrono -lboost_date_time -lboost_atomic -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libconsole_bridge.so.0.4 /opt/ros/melodic/lib/libnlopt_cxx.so -lpthread -lyaml-cpp
